title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese presents six "power phrases" claimed to improve Claude Code productivity by 10x. The video emphasizes that gains come not from better prompts, smarter models, or plugins, but from specific phrasing patterns endorsed by Claude Code's creator and others like Andrej Karpathy, plus a cautionary phrase many users misuse.
writeup: The video presents six "power phrases" that Austin Marchese claims improve Claude Code productivity, arguing that the gains come from specific phrasing patterns rather than from better models, plugins, or generally better prompts. It frames these patterns as endorsed by Claude Code's creator and figures like Andrej Karpathy, and it flags one cautionary phrase that many users misapply. The focus is on agentic coding workflows and how word choice shapes results.
